sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, exacerbated by movement. He describes the pain as sharp and constant. The patient also reports feeling good overall. He admits to a history of smoking and reports a previous surgery.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals a right inguinal lymph node with slightly atypical consistency. The patient's skin shows some skin spots. Vital signs are within normal limits.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has newly diagnosed melanoma. The biopsy revealed an intermediate thickness melanoma. The stage is 1.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: An ultrasound is recommended to rule out metastatic disease. A wide local excision may be needed. Follow-up is required. Skin graft closure may be needed.
